authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
California Department of Parks and Recreation

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(141) — Sonoma Creek and tributaries
sources.quotedText: Sonoma Creek and tributaries (Sonoma Co.) above the Sonoma Creek seasonal waterfall in Sugarloaf Ridge State Park (located 0.2 miles upstream of the west end of the Canyon Trail).

sources.title: Sugarloaf Ridge State Park | California State Parks
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

groups.humanSummary: Sonoma Creek and tributaries above the seasonal waterfall in Sugarloaf Ridge State Park: catch-and-release trout, artificial lures with barbless hooks, open Sat. before Memorial Day through Sep. 30.
groups.verbatimText: Sonoma Creek and tributaries (Sonoma Co.) above the Sonoma Creek seasonal waterfall in Sugarloaf Ridge State Park (located 0.2 miles upstream of the west end of the Canyon Trail). Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

parameters.note: Special regulations apply only to Sonoma Creek and its tributaries above the Sonoma Creek seasonal waterfall in Sugarloaf Ridge State Park, located approximately 0.2 miles upstream of the west end of the Canyon Trail. Water below the waterfall is not covered by this listing.

regulations.humanSummary: Special regulations apply above the seasonal waterfall in Sugarloaf Ridge State Park (0.2 mi upstream of the west end of the Canyon Trail)
regulations.verbatimText: Sonoma Creek and tributaries (Sonoma Co.) above the Sonoma Creek seasonal waterfall in Sugarloaf Ridge State Park (located 0.2 miles upstream of the west end of the Canyon Trail).

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through September 30, catch-and-release only
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: No trout may be kept from the regulated reach above the waterfall; all trout caught must be released.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
